prompt:
A breathtaking cinematic portrait of a young woman standing on a rustic wooden mountain boardwalk, gazing thoughtfully toward the horizon during golden hour. She has long, flowing dark wavy hair, soft natural makeup, delicate floral earrings, and wears a cozy oversized sage-green cardigan over a white polka-dot dress. The warm sunset light gently illuminates her face, creating a dreamy glow and subtle rim lighting around her hair.
Behind her stretches an awe-inspiring alpine landscape with rolling emerald-green hills, winding country roads, scattered mountain cottages, and towering snow-capped peaks rising dramatically above a layer of soft clouds. The mountains are bathed in golden sunlight, with atmospheric haze adding depth and realism. A wooden railing leads the eye through the composition, creating strong leading lines and a sense of perspective.
Ultra-realistic photography, travel magazine aesthetic, romantic wanderlust mood, cinematic storytelling, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, natural colors, highly detailed textures, soft cloud formations, warm golden-hour lighting, photorealistic skin, environmental portrait, luxury travel campaign style, professional DSLR photography, 85mm lens, f/1.8, HDR, 8K resolution, masterpiece quality.
Aspect Ratio: 3:4 (Vertical)
Style Keywords: cinematic, alpine landscape, golden hour, dreamy, Pinterest aesthetic, Instagram-worthy, wanderlust, photorealistic, nature portrait, luxury travel photography.
